title: Senior Plant Manager at Birla Tyres

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Birla Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Birla Tyres in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birla Tyres:
Birla Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres!
